description_long: This storage box is constructed from wooden planks framed by thicker wooden beams, giving it a sturdy and rustic appearance. The planks on each side show visible grain, knots, and some weathering, suggesting it is designed for durability and outdoor or utility use. The box is cubic in shape, with each face bordered by a prominent wooden frame, and the planks are vertically aligned within the frame. The wood has a natural, slightly aged finish, with a mix of lighter and darker brown tones. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, and the top appears to be a fixed, non-removable surface. Its robust build and simple design make it suitable for storage in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments.
description: A robust, cubic wooden storage box with framed plank sides and a rustic, weathered finish. The box is solid and unadorned, suitable for utility or outdoor storage.
description_view_0: The front view shows a framed wooden face with vertically aligned planks, featuring visible grain and some dark weathering marks.
description_view_1: This side view is similar to the front, with slightly different wood grain patterns and more pronounced weathering on the planks.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the same framed plank construction, with a lighter section on the left and more visible knots and cracks.
description_view_3: This view closely resembles the front, with subtle differences in the wood grain and weathering patterns.
